// file: SealedCopy__MyState.kt
package snap.sealedCopy.kdoc

import me.tbsten.cream.*

/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [MyState])
 * 
 * Type-preserving MyState.copy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * Prefer this over a hand-written when().
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: MyState = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: MyState = state.copy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: MyState = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: MyState = state.copy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * # Note
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val next = state.copy(name = "x")
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see MyState
 * @see MyState.Loading
 * @see MyState.Success
 */
public fun snap.sealedCopy.kdoc.MyState.copy(
    name: String = this.name,
): snap.sealedCopy.kdoc.MyState = when (this) {
    is snap.sealedCopy.kdoc.MyState.Loading -> this.copy(name = name)
    is snap.sealedCopy.kdoc.MyState.Success -> this.copy(name = name)
}
````

## Input

````kt
package snap.sealedCopy.kdoc

import me.tbsten.cream.KDoc
import me.tbsten.cream.SealedCopy

@SealedCopy(
    kdoc = KDoc(
        description = "Prefer this over a hand-written when().",
        examples = [
            """
            # Note

            ```kt
            val next = state.copy(name = "x")
            ```
            """,
        ],
    ),
)
sealed interface MyState {
    val name: String

    data class Loading(override val name: String) : MyState
    data class Success(override val name: String, val data: String) : MyState
}
````
